title: Student Induction Week Introduction and Monday Activities
text: Student induction and support week Prepare to 'hit the ground running' with support and advice from professional and academic teams. Sessions take place on campus from 25-29 August 2025. Monday 25 August 2025 Feel Grounded, Feel Inspired, Feel You Belong“Start strong, meet your leaders, and discover your new home.”Welcome & leadership introductionsFun icebreakers & problem-solving workshopMeet your support teams & student handbook launchCampus treasure hunt & high tea with music
summary: University of Southampton Delhi's Student Induction Week, August 25-29, 2025, begins Monday with leadership introductions, icebreakers, support team meetings, and campus exploration for new students.

title: Student Induction Week: Tuesday's Academic Focus
text: Tuesday 26 August 2025 Belong to a legacy“Step into your academic journey and shape your student life.”Academic orientation with programme leadsKnowing your university quizCyber-security & Market simulation workshopsShape your student life: Founding student clubs
summary: Tuesday focuses on academic integration, offering orientation, a university quiz, cybersecurity and market simulation workshops, and opportunities to establish student clubs.

title: Student Induction Week: Wednesday's Digital Readiness
text: Wednesday 27 August 2025 Unlock the learner within“Get digitally ready, explore resources, and embrace new skills.”Getting digitally ready: Academic platformsLibrary & learning resourcesResponsible use of AI in university lifeClubs & communities: Co-creation session
summary: Wednesday's induction covers digital readiness, library resources, responsible AI use, and a co-creation session for clubs and communities to embrace new skills.

title: Student Induction Week: Thursday's Wellbeing & Global Identity
text: Thursday 28 August 2025 Think global, act local“Prioritise wellbeing, build your global identity, and connect through culture.”Wellbeing & support at University of Southampton DelhiBuilding your global identityMeet your Personal Academic Tutor (PAT)Global beats & bites: Open mic evening
summary: Thursday highlights student wellbeing and global identity through support services, meeting Personal Academic Tutors, and a 'Global beats & bites' open mic evening for cultural connection.

title: Student Induction Week: Friday's Confidence Building & Closing
text: Friday 29 August 2025 Shape your space“Find your voice, grow your confidence, and close the week with energy.”Keynote: Belief – An unseen force (Dr Vishal Talwar)Time capsule activity: Letters & videos to future selfTheatre workshop: The five senses experience
summary: Friday concludes induction week, focusing on confidence with a Dr Vishal Talwar keynote, a time capsule activity, and a 'five senses' theatre workshop for self-expression.

title: University of Southampton Delhi Careers and Employer Week
text: What is your next step? Careers and employer week Get advice from employers and our careers team on being career-ready while you study. Sessions take place on campus from 01-05 September 2025. See careers week information
summary: University of Southampton Delhi's Careers and Employer Week, September 1-5, 2025, provides students with expert advice from employers and the careers team on career readiness.
